name: i-dont-want-to-talk-about-it-overcoming-the-secret-legacy-of-male-depression
description: Terrence Real's 'I Don't Want to Talk About It: Overcoming the Secret Legacy of Male Depression' — the landmark book on male depression. Covert depression hidden behind anger, workaholism, and addiction. The intergenerational transmission of emotional wounds from father to son. A path to healing through reconnection.
